creator: ulassayginim@gmail.com
text:
freebsd src from github repo at commit 08b4ae90699a4170585519cd087463c7bd2d4cce

https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd/tree/a1b7645a05c564cbc44103ba3555dbbe95bbae14

make buildworld  gives this error.

Building /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/lib/libc/auxv.o
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/auxv.c:89:8: error: use of undeclared identifier 'AT_BSDFLAGS'
                case AT_BSDFLAGS:
                     ^
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/auxv.c:139:8: error: use of undeclared identifier 'AT_PS_STRINGS'
                case AT_PS_STRINGS:
                     ^
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/auxv.c:337:7: error: use of undeclared identifier 'AT_BSDFLAGS'
        case AT_BSDFLAGS:
             ^
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/auxv.c:344:7: error: use of undeclared identifier 'AT_PS_STRINGS'
        case AT_PS_STRINGS:
             ^
4 errors generated.
